context: Evaluates whether the developer key validation correctly implements HMAC-SHA256 signature verification and expiry checking using the Base64URL-encoded payload+signature key format. This is the security foundation for capybot's privileged developer commands.

checklist.name: Key parsing
checklist.description: The key is split on `.` into exactly two parts; the payload is Base64URL-decoded and JSON-parsed to extract the fields.

checklist.name: HMAC-SHA256 recomputation
checklist.description: The HMAC-SHA256 signature is recomputed over the raw payload string using `process.env.DEV_KEY_SECRET` as the secret key.

checklist.name: Signature comparison
checklist.description: The recomputed signature is Base64URL-encoded and compared to the provided signature; a mismatch causes the function to return `null`.

checklist.name: Expiry check
checklist.description: When `expiry` is a non-null ISO date string, the function checks if the current date is past it and returns `null` if expired. When `expiry` is `null`, no expiry check is performed.

checklist.name: Return value
checklist.description: Returns the decoded payload object on successful validation, or `null` on any failure (parse error, signature mismatch, expired).
